TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mawring_Ku, title = Mawring_Ku, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mawring_Ku} }

S.FORM: Mawring Ku mki sku Takaw Si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 241.39 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 109.93 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 40.14 km²), 1,896 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 581 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,797 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 95%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Mawring Ku ays psgayun 3 ru 3 alang. 3 alang hani ga, Teldreka , 'Oponoho , Kungadavane .

Mawring Ku mki sku Takaw Si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 241.39 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 109.93 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 40.14 km²), 1,896 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 581 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,797 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 95%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Mawring Ku ays psgayun 3 ru 3 alang. 3 alang hani ga, Teldreka , 'Oponoho , Kungadavane .
S.PHON: mawriŋ ku mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na rukaj ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu mawriŋ ku ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, tel*reka , ʔoponoħo , kuŋa*a*ane .
